ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( NOT( ISBLANK( IP_PreAWRWTRValue__c ) ),NOT( ISBLANK( IP_PostAWRWTRValue__c ) ) ),(TEXT( IP_InvoicingMethod__c )="Standard"))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 'Pre and Post WTR Percentage' fields can only be entered if the 'Invoice Type' is set up as 'Hourly Commission' or 'Hourly Percentage'.
